description: As a bioinformatics technician, perform a differential gene expression analysis on human airway smooth muscle cells treated with dexamethasone using RNA-seq data from /home/ga/RProjects/datasets/airway_counts.csv and metadata from /home/ga/RProjects/datasets/airway_coldata.csv (treatment info in 'dex' column). Identify genes regulated by glucocorticoids (treated vs untreated) using DESeq2, edgeR, or limma, filtering for significance at adjusted p-value < 0.05 and |log2FoldChange| > 1. Save the full results table including gene_id, log2FoldChange, pvalue, padj, and significant status to /home/ga/RProjects/output/de_results.csv. Produce a volcano plot at /home/ga/RProjects/output/volcano_plot.png and a heatmap of the top 30 significant genes at /home/ga/RProjects/output/top_genes_heatmap.png. Save a summary of the analysis (total genes, significant, upregulated, and downregulated) to /home/ga/RProjects/output/de_summary.csv and the complete R script to /home/ga/RProjects/airway_de_analysis.R.
